channel.title: golang on Patrick Armengol
channel.description: Recent content in golang on Patrick Armengol

item.title: Backend Learning Plan
item.description: Skills Languages Python Golang Python Frameworks Django Flask FastAPI Golang Frameworks Gin Beego Databases MySQL SQLite PostgreSQL MongoDB ORMs APIs REST GraphQL Containers Docker kubernetes Authentication and Authorization JSON web tokens cookies and sessions OAuth (Google, GitHub) auth libraries (passport, grant) password hashing (bcrypt) protecting endpoints and routes Hosting Platforms DigitalOcean Linode heroku Books ??? Project Ideas space news dashboard kanji of the day srs flashcards like kanji.koohii endangered species tracker site url shortener minimal markdown recipe site cli downloader with progress bars Blog Post Ideas exploring concurrency in python API framework comparison
